description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job should run on a Windows 2022 environment, check out the repository, and clone several plugins from GitHub. It should then generate a Visual Studio project with plugins and the app, and build the solution using MSBuild. The Linux job should run on an Ubuntu 22.04 environment, check out the repository, install dependencies, download 3rd-party libraries, and build the project using gmake.
